scripts.dev:full: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.screenshots:app:desktop: set SCREENSHOT_VARIANT=desktop&& set SCREENSHOT_WIDTH=1536&& set SCREENSHOT_HEIGHT=960&& node scripts/capture-pages.mjs
scripts.screenshots:app:mobile: set SCREENSHOT_VARIANT=mobile&& set SCREENSHOT_WIDTH=430&& set SCREENSHOT_HEIGHT=932&& node scripts/capture-pages.mjs
scripts.screenshots:stitch:desktop: set SCREENSHOT_VARIANT=desktop&& set SCREENSHOT_WIDTH=1536&& set SCREENSHOT_HEIGHT=960&& node scripts/capture-stitch-pages.mjs
scripts.screenshots:stitch:mobile: set SCREENSHOT_VARIANT=mobile&& set SCREENSHOT_WIDTH=430&& set SCREENSHOT_HEIGHT=932&& node scripts/capture-stitch-pages.mjs
scripts.screenshots:pipeline:desktop: npm run screenshots:app:desktop && npm run screenshots:stitch:desktop && npm run screenshots:pack:desktop
scripts.screenshots:pipeline:mobile: npm run screenshots:app:mobile && npm run screenshots:stitch:mobile && npm run screenshots:pack:mobile
scripts.screenshots:pipeline:all: npm run screenshots:pipeline:desktop && npm run screenshots:pipeline:mobile && npm run screenshots:compare
